patch.value: Improve observability: structured remediation, local telemetry analytics, validate --fix-hints, schema versioning
Improve observability: structured remediation, local telemetry analytics, validate --fix-hints, schema versioning
Actionable, privacy-preserving diagnostics for agents and operators

value.author: github-triage-subagent
value.text: Observability/telemetry triage 2026-06-06: latest scheduled Nightly Validation run 27055539337 succeeded across Node 20/22/24/25 plus macOS/Windows matrix. Local node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs --json --telemetry-mode best-effort --max-critical 0 --max-high 0 --max-telemetry-error-rate 10 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0 returned ok=true: Sentry checked with 0 critical/high issues, 14 ignored expected CLI errors, telemetry finish_error_rate_pct 1.9, and failures_without_error_code_rows 0. First attempted mode 'warn' was rejected because supported values are off, best-effort, required.

value.author: codex-active-pm-cycle-20260610
value.text: 2026-06-10 signal sync snapshot: GH alerts are clean (dependabot/code-scanning/secret-scanning all empty). Sentry org=unbrained project=pm-cli: unresolved issue list is dominated by expected command-error scenarios; recent TypeError clusters (PM-CLI-1G/1H) are currently resolved. Continue monitoring PM-CLI-1J tracker_not_initialized serialization events for UX clarity.

patch.value: Telemetry pipeline survives infra restarts without event loss; health and validate advisories carry actionable remediation hints; stats expose percentiles and error rates.

## Charter
Living capability epic for observability: pm health checks, validate fix-hints, remediation registry, local telemetry stack (OTLP export, worker, Postgres/RabbitMQ/Grafana on the remote host), Sentry integration, and stats/percentiles.

## Scope
- In: health/validate/doctor advisory surfaces, remediation-registry completeness, telemetry capture levels + redaction, telemetry stats (percentiles/error-rate/agent-identity), Sentry gates in release flow.
- Out: CI gates themselves (pm-u9d0), secrets handling policy (never write host IPs/tokens to tracked files — standing rule).

## Status
24 closed children (OTLP non-blocking queue PR#233, remediation registry PR#111/#306, Sentry trace knobs PR#303/#305, telemetry stats PR#286). Open child:
- pm-rj3w — telemetry worker lacks Postgres reconnect; ingestion stalls after postgres restart (remote-stack fix, scripts/prod/telemetry).
